welcome.title:
Share the ride,
save on every trip
welcome.subtitle: We connect people going to the same place. No fees, no hassle.

search.title: Find trips to your destination
search.body: See who is already heading your way.

publish.title: Publish your trip and save on gas
publish.body: Add passengers and split the costs.

whatsapp.title: Coordinate on WhatsApp
whatsapp.body: Payment and meeting point are arranged directly with the driver.

welcome.note: You don't need an account to browse trips

trips.title: Trips to your destinations
trips.emptyBody: No trips to your favorite destinations yet. When someone publishes one, you'll see it here.
